prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Alzheimer's Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.4 kg; Height 170.2 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 200mg/dL; 9 months ago 207mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.2kg; 9 months ago 58.1kg; 6 months ago 57.1kg; 3 months ago 58.3kg; current 59.4kg), Height (12 months ago 170.2cm; 9 months ago 170.2cm; 6 months ago 170.2cm; 3 months ago 170.2cm; current 170.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 73U/L; 9 months ago 76U/L; 6 months ago 73U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 76U/L), AST (12 months ago 97U/L; 9 months ago 99U/L; 6 months ago 93U/L; 3 months ago 87U/L; current 100U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; current 95mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 54mg/g; 9 months ago 75mg/g; 6 months ago 77mg/g; 3 months ago 76mg/g; current 65mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 113mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 113mg/dL; current 107mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 12.1g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.74 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
